chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 726 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.4674/2025 (Ex./A) 2. For orders on MA No.4675/2025 (R/Surety) 23.09.2025 None present for the applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 2. This application has been filed by applicant Sikandar Ali Kanasro seeking return of surety document. As per contents of the application, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Khadim Hussain, Roshan Ali, Lutuf Ali, Wajid Ali, Irshad Ali, Aijaz Ali, Ayaz Ali and Amjad Ali were granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 04.12.2018 subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- each, for which the applicant stood surety by depositing original solvency certificate No.17 dated 04.12.2018, issued by the Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Taluka Kotdiji. Thereafter, interim pre-arrest bail of accused was confirmed by this Court vide order dated 12.02.2019. Subsequently, the accused have been acquitted by the learned trial Court, as is evident from judgment dated 31.03.2020, annexed with this application. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, learned Deputy Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
